title: Machine learning in image steganalysis
content:
# Machine learning in image steganalysis

Contributors: schaathun, hans georg
Date: 2012
Subjects: wavelets (mathematics), science / waves & wave mechanics, machine learning, data encryption (computer science)

"The only book to look at steganalysis from the perspective of machine learning theory, and to apply the common technique of machine learning to the particular field of steganalysis; ideal for people working in both disciplines"-- Provided by publisher.
